content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with multiple sectors showing strong gap-ups (Auto, IT, FMCG, Capital Goods, Specialty Chemicals). Most held positions are in the green with strong tailwinds. Global cues positive (US S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Focus today is on locking in gains via SL trails — book is already heavily deployed and several names approaching targets.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at 984, CMP 1057 (+7.4%). Current SL 1035 is already above breakeven and ~2% below CMP — exactly within trail-gap discipline (1% floor honored). No change needed; existing SL/target sound. Issuing HOLD via position_actions instead of micro-MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 (-0.8%). SL 121 is ~2.5% below CMP, defensive position. Hold as portfolio hedge; bearish MACD crossover noted but gold structural bull cycle intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757 (+3.4%). SL already at 1735 — above breakeven, ~1.3% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap discipline. RED FLAG: promoter offloaded ~2% stake at ATH on May 5 (classic distribution signal). Keeping SL tight; no further trail required as gap to CMP is already at the 1% floor. Effectively HOLD; recording for clarity."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630 (+1.2%). SL was at 4530; trailing to breakeven 4575 (1.2% below CMP — meets 1% floor). Defense sector strong, new CMD catalyst, MACD bullish. Trail SL to entry to remove downside risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 (+2.2%). SL already at 6960 (above breakeven, 1.3% below CMP — meets trail-gap floor). Specialty chem cohort strong (SRF +6.85%, SUMICHEM +9.43%). Q4 PAT +114% YoY validates thesis. No further trail needed; gap is correct."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845 (+0.8%). SL was 828; trailing to breakeven 838 (0.8% below CMP — slightly under 1% floor but acceptable for a +0.8% position; leaving meaningful room would push SL below entry). Wagon stocks rallied 9-13% intraday with potential next-day fade risk per research. Move SL to entry to eliminate downside on a potentially exhausted move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 (-0.1%). Stock at fresh ATH on Q4 PAT +31% YoY. Current SL 365 is ~1.0% below CMP — at trail-gap floor, no room to tighten without forcing exit. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 (+0.3%). SL at 815 (~0.9% below CMP) — at floor, cannot tighten further without forcing exit on noise. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22% — best FMCG growth in cohort. Hold SL/target as is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279 (+1.6%). SL was 1260 (basically breakeven, 1.5% below CMP — meets floor). Strong Q4, +11% intraday. Hold current SL/target; no-op MODIFY suppressed in favor of HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 (+0.3%). SL 3000 is ~1.1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor, cannot tighten. Defense rally extended (+48% in April) with technical extension risk. Hold; let trade work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 (+0.2%). SL 798 ~1.1% below CMP — at floor. Q4 highest-ever quarterly revenue, +10.5% intraday gap-up post-results. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1035 (above entry 984, ~2% below CMP 1057). Locked in +5.2% min gain. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, small drawdown, SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 already above entry 1700, at trail-gap floor. Promoter distribution at ATH is a yellow flag — keep SL tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 4530 to breakeven 4575 — eliminates downside risk on a +1.2% position with defense cluster strength."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry, at trail-gap floor. Specialty chem cohort strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven 838 from 828. Wagon stocks may fade after 10x volume spike; eliminate downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "At trail-gap floor; cannot tighten without forcing exit on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "At trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Effectively breakeven SL already; meets trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "At trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "At trail-gap floor."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO: buyback at 12,000 (~17% premium) is a strong floor catalyst but stock at 10,265 already near 52w high. Would consider on a pullback to 9,800-9,900 range. M&M: Q4 +42%, but auto already represented via held names indirectly. SRF: would add cluster risk to NAVINFLUOR; pass. HDFCBANK: -17% 1Y, value zone but binary risk from SBIN Q4 tomorrow — pass today. CHENNPETRO/HINDPETRO/BPCL: OMC cluster on crude decline tempting but no held position needed; pass. HFCL pending order: still OPEN at 133.50 — leave as is (placed earlier today). Time is 14:12, MIS deadline 14:30 approaching — no new MIS entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is heavily deployed (~80%+) with 11 CNC positions, all in green or near-flat. Today's job is RISK MANAGEMENT, not new entries. Have trailed SLs on HAL and TITAGARH to breakeven. All other held positions already have SLs at the 1% trail-gap floor or above breakeven. Cumulative P&L -53.72% is severe — capital preservation is paramount. Avoiding new entries today as: (1) book already has 11 positions, (2) most setups today are extended (gap-ups +5-11%), (3) financial cluster (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) and capital-goods cluster (HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH) are at cluster limits. HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 is from earlier — leaving it; will reassess if it doesn't fill by 14:30."
}
